description: Create a content slide on global patents in selected industries with a stacked area/line-style trend chart over 1980–2019, plus a right sidebar callout and a left chapter navigation panel.

header.headline: Patents in selected industries foretell the next technology wave – Current trends depict an explosion of patents related to digitalization

left.body: Section navigation: 1 Value of Innovation (active); 2 Frontier Technologies; 3 Humans & Machines

right.body: Callout panel with explanatory commentary summarizing the implications of accelerating digitalization-related patent growth.
